hero_description: Natly was created with a clear purpose: to help immigrants in the United States prepare confidently for the citizenship exam through a free, accessible, and human-centered platform.
founder_title: Who am I and why did I create Natly?
founder_p1: I created Natly based on personal and community experience. I have seen firsthand the fear, misinformation, and anxiety many people face when preparing for the citizenship exam.
founder_p2: Natly exists so no one has to go through this process alone, regardless of their education level, language, or financial situation.
founder_quote_title: This project was not created as a business.
founder_quote_text: It was created as a real support tool for the community.
vision_text: To become the most trusted and comprehensive free platform helping immigrants in the United States achieve U.S. citizenship through a modern, accessible, and effective learning experience.
mission_text: To help immigrant communities naturalize through an accessible, reliable, and interactive tool, offering completely free resources that allow anyone to prepare for and pass the citizenship exam with confidence.
objectives_1: A complete platform with all 120 official questions.
objectives_3: Up-to-date content based on USCIS standards.
objectives_4: Fully bilingual content with audio and clear explanations.
objectives_6: Strong educational presence on social media.
closing_text: Natly is not just a platform. It is a companion for those pursuing a better life and the pride of becoming United States citizens.
